diagnosis_used.diagnosis: Branded trend is stable; likely pressure from starter density low, brick pressure high, ratio overfitting, and 1 more.
recommended_adjustments: Explore +1 to +2 starter/searcher slots and prefer cards that add from deck.
Lower max_bricks by 1 and avoid high-level cards without self-summon text.
Retest safer baseline-adjacent ratios before trusting narrow improvements.
Constrain package ratio swings and retest with more runs.

trend_diagnosis.diagnosis: Branded trend is declining; likely pressure from interruption shortage, ratio overfitting, package variance high.
recommended_adjustments: Explore +1 interruption/non-engine slot in meta builds.
Retest safer baseline-adjacent ratios before trusting narrow improvements.
Constrain package ratio swings and retest with more runs.
